title.description: The text description of the todo item.

description.description: A more detailed description of the todo item.

date.description: The date the todo is due.

importance.description: The level of importance assigned to the todo item.

completed.description: Indicates whether the todo item has been completed.

order.description: The sort order of the todo item within a given day.

isRecurring.description: Indicates if the todo item repeats monthly.

originalOrder.description: Stores the original sort order before being marked as complete.

definition.description: Stores individual todo items for a specific user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: todoId
params.description: The unique identifier of the todo item.
